sql.mssql: INSERT INTO THGQMGGMFASE (CODFASEGM, DESCFASEGM, ATIVO) SELECT 1, 'Cadastro', 'S' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGGMFASE WHERE CODFASEGM = 1)
sql.oracle: INSERT INTO THGQMGGMFASE (CODFASEGM, DESCFASEGM, ATIVO) SELECT 1, 'Cadastro', 'S' FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGGMFASE WHERE CODFASEGM = 1)

sql.mssql: INSERT INTO THGQMGGMFASE (CODFASEGM, DESCFASEGM, ATIVO) SELECT 2, 'Questionario', 'S' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGGMFASE WHERE CODFASEGM = 2)
sql.oracle: INSERT INTO THGQMGGMFASE (CODFASEGM, DESCFASEGM, ATIVO) SELECT 2, 'Questionario', 'S' FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGGMFASE WHERE CODFASEGM = 2)

sql.mssql: INSERT INTO THGQMGGMFASE (CODFASEGM, DESCFASEGM, ATIVO) SELECT 3, 'Acoes', 'S' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGGMFASE WHERE CODFASEGM = 3)
sql.oracle: INSERT INTO THGQMGGMFASE (CODFASEGM, DESCFASEGM, ATIVO) SELECT 3, 'Acoes', 'S' FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGGMFASE WHERE CODFASEGM = 3)

sql.mssql: INSERT INTO THGQMGGMFASE (CODFASEGM, DESCFASEGM, ATIVO) SELECT 4, 'Avaliacao de Riscos', 'S' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGGMFASE WHERE CODFASEGM = 4)
sql.oracle: INSERT INTO THGQMGGMFASE (CODFASEGM, DESCFASEGM, ATIVO) SELECT 4, 'Avaliacao de Riscos', 'S' FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGGMFASE WHERE CODFASEGM = 4)

sql.mssql: INSERT INTO THGQMGGMFASE (CODFASEGM, DESCFASEGM, ATIVO) SELECT 5, 'Aprovacao', 'S' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGGMFASE WHERE CODFASEGM = 5)
